title: Weapon Blueprint Rarity Ladder
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for showing one weapon family across rarity tiers, technical breakdowns, and marketing-ready hero views so progression stays visually coherent.

en.title: Weapon Blueprint Rarity Ladder
en.description: Show one weapon family across rarity tiers, technical breakdowns, and marketing-ready hero views so progression and desirability are visually clear.

zh-CN.title: 武器蓝图与稀有度梯度
zh-CN.description: 围绕一套武器家族做普通到传奇的梯度，同时给出蓝图视角、细节特写和商店主图。
